description: CRTX Skill Evolution Policy — controls when and how new Skills are created. Provider-neutral.
pipeline: Error → Evidence → Proposal → Skill → Decision → Capsule

rules.1_evidence_first: Every error MUST be recorded as Evidence (E-*.json) before any Skill is considered.
rules.2_threshold: A Skill Proposal requires 3+ Evidence items sharing the same pattern.
rules.3_proposal_required: Skills may ONLY be created from APPROVED Skill Proposals (SP-*.json).
rules.4_quality: Skills must be short, reusable rules — not bug-specific fixes.
rules.5_dedup: Before creating a new Skill, search existing Skills, Decision Registry, and Evidence Registry. Update existing if similar rule exists.
rules.6_compression: Prefer compression over growth. Merge related skills — do not accumulate.
rules.7_reject_low_value: If a new Skill increases context size without reusable value, reject it.

proposalSchema.expected_benefit: What this prevents in future tasks
